name: godot-mcp-enhanced
description: Enhanced MCP server for Godot game engine — closed-loop AI-assisted development with scene reading, script R/W, screenshots, dynamic GDScript execution, and 130+ tools.
long_description:
godot-mcp-enhanced provides 130+ MCP tools for Godot game development:

- **Scene Operations**: Read/create/edit/save scenes, add/remove/inspect nodes
- **Script R/W**: Read/write/edit GDScript with search-and-replace
- **Dynamic Execution**: Execute GDScript snippets in headless Godot
- **Screenshots**: Capture and analyze game scenes
- **UI Layout**: CSS Flexbox/Grid to Godot Container tree
- **TileMap**: Read/write/fill/copy tilemaps
- **Animation**: Play/edit animations and AnimationTree
- **Navigation**: Create regions, agents, links, query paths
- **Physics**: Raycast, body info, collision overlay
- **Audio**: Play/stop/set parameters
- **Particles**: GPU particles with 6 presets
- **Runtime Debug**: Game Bridge for live debugging, input simulation, signal watching
- **Validation**: Script validation, project verification, delivery checks

Supports Headless CLI, Editor WebSocket, and Game Bridge modes.

godot_path.title: Godot Path
godot_path.description: Path to Godot 4.x executable (auto-detected if omitted). For multi-version setups, use .godot/mcp-godot.json per project.

project_path.title: Project Path
project_path.description: Default Godot project directory (auto-detected from cwd if omitted)

allowed_paths.title: Allowed Project Paths
allowed_paths.description: Semicolon-separated list of allowed project root paths for security
